ab: Ma haip pal’un qanian, dusa aak masituqas-nau’az munhaan Taitu’ tantungu haan pantamaun ta.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: Maina haan aam Taihuku tunlaihlai munhaan Taitu’.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: Panhaan in Taitu’ a, pantamaun ma’unting laihlaih munhaan papandu’an antala zami.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: Papandu’an i pantamaun ta lumaq nii tu pakadaqvis, maun’ting muhiav a pandipin.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: Pantamaun lumaq dingalan haiza madaing tu sasaipukan sinanaipuk, muskun aam tuntauntaun munhaan sasaipukan sinanaipuk.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: Ihaan sasaipukan sinanaipuk ta, dasun aam pantamaun mapakaun i sidih siin tun’uma.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: Sanavan, muskun aam muhaan malalabasan dangi’anan ma’un.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: Madia malalabasan dangi’anan ta laihlaih, paqpun tundaza aam pautpat mun’ita.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: Namudanin a, sadu tu tangqai’iu’un a pautpaut, lusqa in aam tunvasu mudaan.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: Maa laupadau aam musqais in haan Taihuku, nii niap tu ukiliman in naupa panTamaun tu pautpaut.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
